popularStory.headline: History of Isabella Mar (1277-1296)
popularStory.description: Isabella of Mar (fl. c. 1277 – 12 December 1296) was the first wife of Robert Bruce VII, Earl of Carrick. Isabella died before her husband was crowned (as Robert I) King of Scotland. She and her husba …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella of Mar Countess of Carrick於1277年7月11日出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米時，她的父親Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar34歲，母親Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger'47歲。她於1290年與Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1296年12月12日在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾卡德洛斯享年19歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利佩斯利 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella of Mar Countess of Carrick于1277年7月11日出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米时，她的父亲Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar34岁，母亲Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger'47岁。她于1290年与Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1296年12月12日在苏格兰登巴頓史爾卡德洛斯享年19岁，埋葬在苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利佩斯利 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: Mar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Gim, Wai, Fong, Hong, Man Chung, Moo, Mun, Quon, Wing, Yat, Bok, Chun.
Spanish, Portuguese, Galician, Asturian-Leonese, and Catalan: topographic name for someone living by the sea, from mar ‘sea’ (from Latin mare).
German: nickname from Middle High German mar(w) ‘tender, delicate’, or an altered form of Mahr, a topographic name from mar ‘lake, swamp, stagnant water’.

variants.name: Martin
meanings: English, Scottish, Irish, French, Walloon, Breton, Dutch, Flemish, German, Czech, Slovak, Croatian, Italian (Veneto); Spanish (Martín): from a personal name derived from Latin Martinus, itself a derivative of Mars, genitive Martis, the Roman god of fertility and war, whose name may derive ultimately from a root mar ‘gleam’. This was borne by a famous 4th-century Christian saint, Martin of Tours, and consequently became extremely popular throughout Europe in the Middle Ages. In North America, the surname Martin has absorbed cognates and derivatives from other languages, e.g. Slovak and Rusyn (from Slovakia) Marcin , Albanian Martini , Polish surnames beginning with Marcin-, and Slovenian patronymics like Martinčič (see Martincic ). Martin is the most frequent surname in France and one of the most frequent surnames in Wallonia.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Mártain, ‘descendant of Martin’ (compare 1 above). Otherwise, a shortened form of Gilmartin or McMartin ; sometimes also spelled Martyn.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella of Mar Countess of Carrick was born on 11 July 1277, in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, her father, Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar, was 34 and her mother, Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger', was 47. She married Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots in 1290. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 12 December 1296, in Cardross, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, at the age of 19, and was buried in Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella of Mar Countess of Carrick est née le 11 juillet 1277, à Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger', avait 47 ans. Elle a épousé Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots en 1290. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 décembre 1296, à Cardross, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 19 ans, et a été enterrée à Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella of Mar Countess of Carrick am 11. Juli 1277 in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar 34 und ihre Mutter Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger' 47. Sie hat 1290 Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Dezember 1296 im Alter von 19 Jahren in Cardross, Dunbartonshire, Scotland und wurde in Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella of Mar Countess of Carrick è nata il il 11 luglio 1277 nel Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, sua padre, Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger', aveva 47 anni. Lei sposato Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots nel 1290. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 12 dicembre 1296, nel Cardross, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, all'età di 19 anni, e fu sepolta a Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella of Mar Countess of Carrickが1277年7月11日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアキルドルンミーで生まれた時，父Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Marは34歳，母Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger'は47歳であった。1290年にRobert I the Bruce, King of Scotsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1296年12月12日にスコットランドダンバートンシュアイアカードロスで19歳で死去し，スコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーペイスリー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella of Mar Countess of Carrick(이)가 1277년 7월 11일 스컷랜드 압르디실르 킬드럼미에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger'(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 1290년 Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1296년 12월 12일 스컷랜드 던바토실르 카드로스에서 19세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리 파이슬리 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.11 July 1277–12 December 1296: 11 de julho de 1277–12 de dezembro de 1296
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella of Mar Countess of Carrick nasceu em 11 de julho de 1277, em Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger', tinha 47 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots em 1290. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de dezembro de 1296, em Cardross, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, com 19 anos, e foi sepultada em Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella of Mar Countess of Carrick родилась 11 июля 1277 г. в местности каилдрумми, абирдиншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger', 47. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots в 1290 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 12 декабря 1296 г. в местности кардросс, дунбартоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 19 лет и была похоронена в местности пеисли эбби, пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия.

es.11 July 1277–12 December 1296: 11 de julio de 1277–12 de diciembre de 1296
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella of Mar Countess of Carrick nació el 11 de julio de 1277, en Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger', tenía 47 años. Se casó con Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots en 1290. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de diciembre de 1296, en Cardross, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 19 años, y fue sepultada en Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.
